texts.title: 咖啡店的小故事
texts.description: Short reading sample for sentence-by-sentence review.

lines.hanzi: 今天我去一家安静的咖啡店。
lines.pinyin: jin tian wo qu yi jia an jing de ka fei dian
lines.translation: Today I went to a quiet cafe.

lines.hanzi: 我一边听音乐，一边看中文书。
lines.pinyin: wo yi bian ting yin yue, yi bian kan zhong wen shu
lines.translation: I listened to music while reading a Chinese book.

lines.hanzi: 如果我不懂一个词，我就记下来做成卡片。
lines.pinyin: ru guo wo bu dong yi ge ci, wo jiu ji xia lai zuo cheng ka pian
lines.translation: If I do not understand a word, I write it down and turn it into a card.
